zh.lifeSummary: 當Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster於大約1059年出生在愛爾蘭蒙斯特時，他的父親Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland51歲，母親Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig49歲。他於大約1100年與Mór Ua Conchobair在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1120年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克科克 9享年62歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster于大约1059年出生在爱尔兰蒙斯特时，他的父亲Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland51岁，母亲Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig49岁。他于大约1100年与Mór Ua Conchobair在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1120年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克科克 9享年62岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛。

nameMeanings.name: Ua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Teochew form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

nameMeanings.name: Diarmait
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Earlier Diarm(u)it, of uncertain derivation; perhaps from dí ‘without’ + airmit ‘injunction’ or airmait ‘envy’. See also Dermot .

variants.name: Diarmuid
meanings: Earlier Diarm(u)it, of uncertain derivation; perhaps from dí ‘without’ + airmit ‘injunction’ or airmait ‘envy’. See also Dermot .

variants.name: Dermot
meanings: Anglicized form of the Irish name Diarmaid , now also used elsewhere in the English-speaking world. In Irish legend, Diarmaid was the lover of Gráinne, who had been promised to the ageing hero Finn mac Cumhaill, leader of the Fianna. The lovers eloped, but were pursued for sixteen years by Finn; according to one version of the story, Diarmaid was eventually killed by a wild boar and Gráinne died of grief.

nameMeanings.name: mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Maria and Margit , now also used as an independent given name and as an element of compound names such as Mai-Britt, Mai-Lis, Anne-Mai, and Britt-Mai.

en.lifeSummary: When Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster was born about 1059, in Munster, Ireland, his father, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, was 51 and his mother, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, was 49. He married Mór Ua Conchobair about 1100, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1120, in Cork 9, Cork, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Killaloe, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster est né environ 1059, à Munster, Irlande, son père, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Mór Ua Conchobair environ 1100, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1120, à Cork 9, Cork, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Killaloe, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster um 1059 in Munster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland 51 und seine Mutter Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig 49. Er hat um 1100 in Irland Mór Ua Conchobair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1120 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Cork 9, Cork, County Cork, Irland und wurde in Killaloe, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster è nato il circa 1059 nel Munster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Mór Ua Conchobair circa 1100, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1120, nel Cork 9, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munsterが約1059年にアイルランドムンスターで生まれた時，父Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Irelandは51歳，母Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraigは49歳であった。約1100年にアイルランドでMór Ua Conchobairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1120年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクコルク 9で62歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーキラロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster(이)가 대략 1059년 아일랜드 먼스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig(은)는 49세였다. 그는 대략 1100년 아일랜드에서 Mór Ua Conchobair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1120년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크 코르크 9에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 킬라로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster nasceu aproximadamente 1059, em Munster, Irlanda, seu pai, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Mór Ua Conchobair aproximadamente 1100, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1120, em Cork 9, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster родился около 1059 г. в местности мунстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Mór Ua Conchobair около 1100 г. в местности Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1120 г. в местности корк 9, корк, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности киллало, коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.from 1116 to 1120: mai le 1116 e o'o I le 1120

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diarmait mac Toirdelbach Ua Briain King of Munster nació aproximadamente 1059, en Munster, Irlanda, su papá, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Mór Ua Conchobair aproximadamente 1100, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1120, en Cork 9, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda.
